analytics.totalDealsTooltip: Count of every deal in this pipeline that isn't marked as Lost. Won deals are still included.
analytics.pipelineValueTooltip: Sum of the dollar values of all deals in this pipeline, excluding deals marked as Lost.
analytics.avgDealSizeTooltip: Pipeline Value divided by Total Deals — the average value of a single non-lost deal.
analytics.weightedValueTooltip: Expected revenue: each open deal's value × its stage probability. First stage ≈ 10%, stages progress up to 90%, Won = 100%. Lost deals are excluded.
analytics.projectedCommissionTooltip: Sum of the commission on every product across deals that aren't marked as Lost.
analytics.wonThisMonthTooltip: Deals marked as Won since the first day of the current month.

welcomeMessage.name: Welcome Message
welcomeMessage.description: Automatically replies to first-time contacts with a greeting.
welcomeMessage.text1: Hi! 👋 Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.

outOfOffice.name: Out of Office
outOfOffice.description: Automatically replies outside business hours so no one is left waiting.
outOfOffice.text1: Thanks for your message! Our team is currently offline (9am–6pm) and will reply as soon as possible tomorrow.

leadQualifier.name: Lead Qualifier
leadQualifier.description: Asks qualifying questions to filter incoming leads.
leadQualifier.text1: Great — I'll help you with pricing! Quick question: roughly how many users are you looking for?

followUpReminder.name: Follow-up Reminder
followUpReminder.description: Sends a reminder if a contact doesn't reply within 24 hours.
followUpReminder.text1: Just checking in — do you have any more questions? We're here to help!

customFields.title: Custom fields
customFields.description: Extra contact fields (e.g. ZIP code, lead source). They appear on every contact and in the "Update Contact Field" automation action.

deals.title: Deals & currency
deals.description: The currency used for new deals and for pipeline and dashboard totals.
deals.defaultCurrencyDescription: New deals default to this currency, and pipeline and dashboard totals are shown in it. Existing deals keep the currency they were saved with.
deals.adminOnlyHint: Only account admins can change the default currency.

fieldsAndTags.title: Fields & tags
fieldsAndTags.description: Two ways to organize contacts: colour-coded tags for quick grouping, and custom fields for structured data.

inviteMember.title: Invite a teammate
inviteMember.description: Generate a one-time invite link. Share it via WhatsApp, Slack, or any channel you like — no email service required.
inviteMember.roleDescriptionAdmin: Can invite teammates, manage settings, send messages, and edit data.
inviteMember.roleDescriptionAgent: Can use the inbox, contacts, broadcasts, automations, and flows. No settings or member access.
inviteMember.roleDescriptionViewer: Read-only access across every page. Cannot send or edit anything.
inviteMember.labelTooLong: Label must be {max} characters or fewer
inviteMember.networkError: Could not reach the server. Try again?
inviteMember.copyBlocked: Clipboard blocked — copy the link manually
inviteMember.whatsappMessage: Join {accountName} on Funilly using this link (valid for {days} days): {url}
inviteMember.resultDescriptionPart1: Share this link with your new teammate. They'll be able to sign up (or sign in) and join the account as
inviteMember.warningBody: We never store the plaintext — once you close this dialog the URL is gone. To re-share, revoke this invite and create a new one.
inviteMember.labelHint: Helps you remember who you sent the link to in the pending list below.

members.title: Team members
members.description: People with access to this account. Roles control what each teammate can do.
members.expiresInDays: expires in {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
members.expiresInHours: expires in {count, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}}

members.noPendingHintPart2: above to generate a shareable link.
members.removeConfirmPart2: from the account? They'll be signed out of this account and given a fresh personal account on their next sign-in. Their login isn't deleted.

nps.title: Satisfaction (NPS)
nps.description: Automatic satisfaction survey sent via WhatsApp after service.
nps.cardDescription: When enabled, the customer gets a 1-to-5-star question at the end of service — manually (when closing the conversation) or after a period of inactivity.
nps.enableHint: Fires when closing a conversation and after inactivity.
nps.inactivityHoursLabel: Also fire after X hours of inactivity
nps.followUpHint: Sent after the customer replies with a rating, asking for an optional comment.
nps.adminOnlyHint: Only account admins can change these settings.
nps.invalidHours: Enter a valid number of hours.
nps.defaultMessageTemplate: Hi! How would you rate the service you received? Reply with a number from 1 to 5, where 1 = Poor and 5 = Excellent. 😊
nps.defaultFollowUpMessage: Thanks for your rating! Any additional comments? (optional)

password.title: Password
password.description: Use at least {min} characters. You will stay signed in on this device after changing it.
password.noEmail: Cannot change password without a current email
password.minLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
password.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match

productCatalog.title: Products
productCatalog.description: Catalog of pre-registered products — name, default value, and default commission that an agent can pick from when adding a product to a deal.
productCatalog.cardDescription: Only admins can create, edit, or delete products in the catalog.
productCatalog.confirmDelete: Delete the product "{name}" from the catalog?
productCatalog.formHint: These values only pre-fill the fields — the agent can still adjust them when adding the product to a deal.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: How you show up across the app. Your avatar and name appear in the header, sidebar, and anywhere your teammates see you.
profile.unsupportedImageHint: Use PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF.
profile.profileSavedCheckEmail: Profile saved — check your email to confirm the address change
profile.photoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF. Up to 2 MB.
profile.emailChangePendingPart3: — both need to confirm before the change takes effect.

security.title: Login & security
security.description: Change your password and sign out of your devices. These keep your account safe.

sessions.cardDescription: Sign out of every device where you're logged in — including this one. Useful if you lost a laptop or shared your password.
sessions.confirmDescription: Every device logged into this account will be signed out and will need to log in again. You will be redirected to the login page.

tags.cardDescription: Colour-coded labels for grouping and filtering contacts.
tags.empty: No tags yet — create your first one below.
tags.deleteTagConfirm: Delete the tag "{name}"? This removes it from all contacts and cannot be undone.

templates.title: Message templates
templates.description: Create templates and submit them to Meta for approval. Use "Sync from Meta" to pull templates approved elsewhere.
templates.syncButtonTitle: Pull approved templates from your Meta WhatsApp Business Account
templates.emptyHint: Create your first message template to get started.
templates.editTooltip: Editing triggers Meta re-review — status flips to PENDING.
templates.resubmitTooltip: Edit the template and resubmit to Meta for review.
templates.deleteFromMetaAria: Delete template from Meta and locally
templates.editSubmitted: Edit submitted — Meta typically reviews within 24 hours.
templates.submitted: Submitted to Meta — typical review time is 24 hours. Status updates automatically.
templates.syncedCount: Synced {count, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}} from Meta
templates.syncTruncated: Synced the first 2000 templates only — your account has more. Sync again to continue, or contact support if this persists.
templates.headerImageInvalidType: Header image must be a JPEG or PNG.
templates.headerImageTooLarge: Image is {mb} MB — Meta's limit is 5 MB.
templates.editDescription: Save your changes to re-submit to Meta. Status will flip back to PENDING during review.
templates.createDescription: Build a template and submit it to Meta for approval. Once approved, you can use it in broadcasts and the inbox.
templates.authWarningPart1: AUTHENTICATION templates have a fixed body + OTP button shape that needs a different builder. Create them in Meta WhatsApp Manager for now and use
templates.nameFixedHint: Name is fixed once a template exists on Meta — create a new template to change it.
templates.nameFormatHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.
templates.languageFixedHint: Language is fixed once a template exists on Meta.
templates.languageFormatHintPrefix: Must match the exact code on Meta —
templates.headerSamplePlaceholder: Sample value for '{{1}}' (required for Meta review)
templates.mediaHintImage: Upload a JPEG/PNG (≤5 MB, ≥800×418 px recommended) or paste a public HTTPS link — we upload it to Meta for review automatically.
templates.mediaHintGeneric: Must be a publicly accessible HTTPS link. Meta fetches it once during review, so it needs to stay live for ~24 hrs.
templates.bodyVariablesHintMid: for variables (must be contiguous starting at
templates.sampleValuesLabel: Sample values (Meta uses these to review your template)
templates.buttonsHint: Up to {max} buttons. QUICK_REPLY buttons must come before URL / phone / copy-code buttons.
templates.deleteMetaDescription: "{name}" will be deleted from Meta and from Funilly. Active broadcasts using this template will start failing on their next send. This can't be undone.
templates.deleteLocalDescription: "{name}" will be deleted from Funilly. It was never submitted to Meta, so no remote cleanup is needed.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp connection
whatsapp.description: Connect your Meta WhatsApp Business API. Credentials, webhook, and setup steps all live here.

metaPricing.title: Meta rates (Broadcast ROI)
metaPricing.description: Used to calculate the real cost and ROI of each broadcast in Reports.
metaPricing.apiLimitationHint: Meta doesn't expose per-message rates via API — only the billing model (legacy per-conversation or current per-message). Enter the rates below manually, per your Meta pricing table.
metaPricing.checkModelFailed: Could not check the billing model

whatsapp.tokenRequiredInitial: Access Token is required for initial setup
whatsapp.reenterToken: Please re-enter the Access Token to save changes
whatsapp.savedButRegistrationFailed: Saved, but Meta couldn't register the number: {error}
whatsapp.credentialsSavedSkipped: Credentials saved and verified. Inbound registration was skipped (no PIN) — see Registration status below.
whatsapp.connectedGeneric: WhatsApp connected. Events will start flowing within a minute.
whatsapp.connectionTestFailed: Connection test failed. Check network and try again.
whatsapp.numberFullyWired: Number is fully wired — Meta is delivering events.
whatsapp.numberNotFullyRegistered: Number is not fully registered. See the checks below for which step failed.
whatsapp.verifyEndpointUnreachable: Could not reach the verification endpoint.
whatsapp.resetConfirm: This will delete the current WhatsApp config so you can re-enter it. Continue?
whatsapp.resetSuccess: Configuration cleared. You can now re-enter your credentials.
whatsapp.credentialsValidHint: Your access token authenticates with Meta. See Registration status below for whether webhooks are actually wired.
whatsapp.connectHint: Configure your Meta API credentials below to connect your WhatsApp Business account.
whatsapp.registeredTitle: Registered — Meta will deliver events to Funilly
whatsapp.notRegisteredTitle: Not registered — Meta will not deliver events
whatsapp.lastAttemptFailedSuffix: . Enter (or correct) the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to retry.
whatsapp.neverRegisteredHint: This number was saved before registration tracking existed, or registration was skipped. Enter the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to subscribe it.
whatsapp.apiCredentialsDescription: Enter your Meta WhatsApp Business API credentials.
whatsapp.tokenHiddenHint: Token is hidden for security. Re-enter it to update configuration.
whatsapp.verifyTokenHint: A custom string you create. Must match the token you set in Meta webhook settings.
whatsapp.pinHintPath: Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp Accounts → Phone Numbers → Two-step verification
whatsapp.pinHintPart4: , then paste it here so Funilly can subscribe the number — otherwise Meta routes inbound events to whichever app last claimed it (the symptom that hits second numbers under a shared WABA).
whatsapp.pinHintPart5: have no PIN and are pre-registered — leave this blank for them. Leaving it blank also keeps an existing registration untouched.
whatsapp.webhookConfigDescription: Use this URL as your webhook callback in the Meta App Dashboard.

qualityTab.conversationsPerDayHint: Conversations your account can start per day, allowed by Meta ({tier}).
tips: Warm up new numbers by gradually increasing send volume over the first few weeks.
Prioritize replying to conversations the contact started — they don't count against send limits.
Avoid sending the same template repeatedly to the same audience in a short time.
Monitor your block/report rate and pause sends if it rises.
Respect the recipient's local business hours when scheduling broadcasts.
qualityTab.qualityGreenDescription: Your number is in good standing with Meta. Keep respecting the send limits.
qualityTab.qualityYellowDescription: Quality has dropped a bit. Avoid mass sends and prioritize messages contacts actually want.
qualityTab.qualityRedDescription: Ban risk. Pause mass broadcasts and focus on conversations the contacts started.
qualityTab.qualityUnknownDescription: Could not verify the number's quality with Meta.

userRankingTable.title: Ranking by user
userRankingTable.avgResponseTimeHeaderTooltip: Sender_id isn't reliable per-agent yet — it will be computed individually once that data is available.
userRankingTable.avgResponseTimeCellTooltip: Will be computed individually once the data is available.

aiGenerate.modalDescription: Describe what you want to automate in plain language and the AI builds the structure for you to review before saving.

aiGenerate.promptPlaceholderFlow: E.g.: When the customer asks to speak to an agent, ask why and transfer to a human

aiGenerate.exampleQualify: Qualify a lead with a question
aiGenerate.exampleNps: NPS survey after closing a conversation
